violations.text: Establishment does not have a restroom located in the vicinity. Per owner, establishment uses the restroom in the adjacent house that is owned by her as well. Contacted RIDOH supervisor to determine corrective action. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2025

The dumpster outside is located on dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2025

The production room is lacking a hand-washing sink. Establishment must discontinue operating until a hand-washing sink is installed. Please email inspector proof of installation. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2025

Food packaged in the food establishment are lacking label information. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Establishment must not sell packaged foods until labels are corrected. Please email inspector proof of correction. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2025

Establishment does not have a restroom located in the vicinity. Per owner, establishment uses the restroom in the adjacent house that is owned by her as well. Contacted RIDOH supervisor to determine corrective action. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2025

The dumpster outside is located on dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2025
The mop sink in is in poor repair (no running water). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2025
